name: Romanian Deadlift
howTo: Hinge at the hips with a soft knee bend, keep the bar close, and stop when your hamstrings are loaded without losing a flat back.

name: Standing Calf Raise
howTo: Drive through the balls of your feet, pause at the top, and lower under control into a full calf stretch.

name: Barbell Row
howTo: Brace your torso in a strong hinge, row the bar toward your lower chest or upper abs, and avoid jerking the weight.

name: Lat Pulldown
howTo: Pull your elbows down toward your ribs, keep your chest tall, and control the return without shrugging up.

name: Face Pull
howTo: Pull the rope toward eye level with elbows high, then rotate your hands back to finish with upper-back tension.

name: Barbell Bench Press
howTo: Set your upper back, keep your feet planted, lower the bar to your mid chest, and press back up over your shoulders.

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
howTo: Press the dumbbells from an incline bench while keeping your shoulder blades tucked and your wrists stacked over your elbows.

name: Overhead Press
howTo: Brace your trunk, press in a straight line overhead, and move your head through once the bar clears your forehead.

name: Hammer Curl
howTo: Keep a neutral grip, pin your elbows near your sides, and curl without swinging your shoulders forward.

name: Tricep Pushdown
howTo: Lock your elbows by your sides, drive the handle down until your arms are straight, and let the weight return under control.
